Metadata.title: Ride Share NZ – Shared rides in New Zealand
Metadata.description: Find and post shared rides across New Zealand. Save on transport and meet people.

Home.subtitle: Shared rides across New Zealand
Home.tripsCount: {count, plural, one {# trip available} other {# trips available}}
Home.publishCta: Post your trip and share the costs with others

Guide.title: How to use RideShare NZ
Guide.subtitle: A quick guide to find a ride or post your own — it only takes a minute.
Guide.searchStep1: On the home page, type your departure city in Origin and where you're going in Destination.
Guide.searchStep2: Optionally choose a Date, then tap Search.
Guide.searchStep3: Browse the results. Each card shows the driver, time, available seats and the price.
Guide.joinStep1: Tap a trip to open its details and see the driver's profile and reviews.
Guide.joinStep2: Sign in or create a free account (it takes less than 2 minutes).
Guide.joinStep3: Tap Join trip to reserve your seat — the driver is notified instantly.
Guide.joinStep4: Use Send message or the driver's WhatsApp to agree on the pickup point and time.
Guide.postStep1: Sign in, then tap + Post trip at the top or on the home page.
Guide.postStep2: Choose origin, destination, date, time, available seats and an optional price.
Guide.postStep3: Publish it. Other travellers can now find and join your trip.
Guide.tip1: Complete your profile and add a photo — it builds trust with other travellers.
Guide.tip2: Agree on the meeting point and how to pay before the trip starts.
Guide.tip3: Leave a review after the ride to help the rest of the community.
